productSummary.headline: DecisionLens has now matured into a connected multi-layer decision intelligence product shell.
productSummary.body: The overview, intelligence, liquidity, review, academy, macro, reports, alerts, profile, and admin layers now work together as a unified MVP structure. This phase focuses on cohesion, private analytics placement, and clearer system governance.

layerStatus.name: Overview
layerStatus.detail: Core temperature, sessions, news, and watchlist context.

layerStatus.name: Intelligence
layerStatus.detail: Institutional context and narrative observation layers.

layerStatus.name: Review
layerStatus.detail: Private reflection, patterns, and learning linkage.

layerStatus.name: Academy
layerStatus.detail: Preview plus full structured education system.

layerStatus.name: Macro
layerStatus.detail: Reference library for terms, impact, and dashboard connection.

layerStatus.name: Alerts
layerStatus.detail: Context notification center with quiet-hour logic shell.

layerStatus.name: Admin
layerStatus.detail: Manual approvals, user oversight, and policy shell.

governanceNotes: DecisionLens never uses buy/sell language, targets, or urgency framing.
Private development metrics belong in Profile and Academy analytics, not the main dashboard.
Notifications are context-oriented and subject to quiet hours, daily caps, and neutral tone.
Premium pages remain guarded while the product evolves toward production automation.
Admin power cannot override the platform philosophy.

profileAnalytics.leaderboardPolicy: No public ranking, no social comparison, no competitive scoreboards.
profileAnalytics.currentMVPState: Private analytics structure is now visible and placed correctly for later expansion.
